vocab.meaning: sự tương tác giác quan trực tiếp (không thông qua thiết bị)
vocab.example: Playing with mud and river stones offered a type of unmediated sensory engagement that modern digital games simply cannot replicate.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng điều hướng/nhận thức không gian
vocab.example: Building intricate labyrinthine tunnels in the backyard sandpit significantly bolstered my spatial navigation skills at a young age.

vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn để tự ngẫm nghĩ/nội tâm
vocab.example: I viewed my small attic bedroom as a sanctuary for introspection, where I would spend hours sketching or writing journals.

vocab.meaning: sự học hỏi ngẫu nhiên (không chủ định)
vocab.example: Through the incidental learning that occurred while helping my father in the garden, I inadvertently memorized the names of dozens of local plants.

vocab.meaning: sự khéo léo của đôi tay thông qua tiếp xúc
vocab.example: Folding complex origami figures was my preferred method of developing tactile dexterity during the rainy season.

vocab.meaning: kỹ năng chế tác thô sơ
vocab.example: I took great pride in my rudimentary craftsmanship, often carving small wooden boats to sail in the neighborhood gutters.

vocab.meaning: giải quyết vấn đề theo nhóm
vocab.example: Organizing elaborate treasure hunts required a high degree of collaborative problem-solving among my circle of friends.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi mang tính khám phá tri thức/quy luật
vocab.example: Mixing various household liquids to see their chemical reactions was a form of epistemic play that sparked my love for science.

vocab.meaning: trò chơi nhập vai dựa trên cốt truyện
vocab.example: My favorite afternoon activity involved narrative-driven role-play where we acted out scenes from classic mythology.

vocab.meaning: khả năng phục hồi/sức bền thể chất
vocab.example: Learning to ride a bicycle through various terrains definitely built up my physical resilience and perseverance as a child.
